title: GlassAndBedColorize
description: GlassAndBedColorize lets you dye glass blocks, panes, and beds directly in the world! Simply right-click with any dye to change their color instantly, or use a brush to reset them.
body:
Tired of crafting new blocks just to change a color? GlassAndBedColorize adds seamless in-world coloring for:

Glass & Glass Panes: Right-click with dye to stain them.
Beds: Change your bedding color on the fly.
Resetting: Use a Brush to return any colored glass or bed to its default state.
